title: TFC Ore Loot
description: Makes Silk Touch and Fortune available for TFC:TNG's ore.
body:
The ores in [TerraFirmaCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft) do not support some vanilla enchantments like Silk Touch and Fortune.

This simple datapack makes Silk Touch and Fortune available for ores in TFC.

![Vanilla Enchantment Available](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da7f5796e88f6c65028691cc9f41e6a039deae00.png)
